mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '${username}' AND password = '${password}'
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ${requestedId} AND id = ${scopeUserId}
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{requestedId} AND id = #{scopeUserId}
SELECT id, username, email, role FROM users WHERE role = 'user' ORDER BY ${sortField} ${sortOrder} LIMIT 3
SELECT id, username, email, role FROM users WHERE role = 'user' ORDER BY ${column} ${direction} LIMIT 3
SELECT title, SUBSTRING(content, 1, 80) AS snippet, created_at FROM news WHERE is_public = true AND title LIKE '%${q}%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT title, SUBSTRING(content, 1, 80) AS snippet, created_at FROM news WHERE is_public = true AND title LIKE #{searchQ} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ${safeTitleExpr} AS title, SUBSTRING(content, 1, 80) AS snippet, created_at FROM news WHERE is_public = true AND title LIKE #{searchQ} UNION ALL SELECT alias_username AS title, alias_email AS snippet, CAST(${acctTsExpr} AS TIMESTAMP) AS created_at FROM vw_accounts ) AS merged ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ${safeTitleExpr} AS title, SUBSTRING(content, 1, 80) AS snippet, created_at FROM news WHERE is_public = true AND title LIKE #{searchQ} UNION ALL SELECT alias_username AS title, alias_email AS snippet, CAST(TIMESTAMP '2000-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP) AS created_at FROM vw_accounts ) AS merged ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT title, snippet, created_at FROM ( (SELECT title, SUBSTRING(content, 1, 80) AS snippet, created_at FROM news WHERE is_public = true AND title LIKE #{searchQ} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 4) UNION ALL (SELECT title, SUBSTRING(content, 1, 80) AS snippet, created_at FROM news WHERE is_public = false AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE ${probe}) ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1) ) merged ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT title, SUBSTRING(content, 1, 80) AS snippet, created_at FROM news WHERE ${visibility} AND title LIKE #{searchQ} ORDER BY ${column} ${direction} LIMIT 5
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE ${probe}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
SELECT title, SUBSTRING(content, 1, 80) AS snippet, created_at FROM news WHERE is_public = true AND title LIKE #{searchQ} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
